The next letter 'م' (from the word 'مُّبِيْنٍ') belongs to the Yarmaloon letters (ي ر م ل و ن). This means we apply Idgham (إدغام), which is the rule of merging. Since the letter 'م' is one of (ي و م ن), you must perform idgham with a nasal sound (ghunnah), also called Idgham with Ghunnah (إدغام بغنة).
